summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse video: a color graded, letterboxed montage set to music with teal and amber tones and lens flares. A motorcade moves past the Washington Monument at golden hour, then the video cuts to construction workers in hard hats and work shirts lined up by a 'MID-AMERICA' trailer (Atoka, OK). Trump walks the line in a long coat and stands with the workers, who give thumbs-up and are smiling. It ends on a black title card.

script.scene: Wide shot with a teal and amber grade and a lens flare: a black SUV motorcade rolls across an open plaza with the Washington Monument behind it at golden hour. Music, no speech.
Cut to a dimly lit line of bearded construction workers in hard hats and work shirts, standing shoulder to shoulder facing the camera under a banner reading 'America'.
Low-angle shot of Trump in a dark long coat and suit standing before the line of workers; their boots and jeans fill the frame beside a black Cadillac SUV. Dim tone.
Group shot in front of a 'MID-AMERICA / Atoka, OK' equipment trailer: Trump in a red tie at center, the workers around him giving thumbs-up and smiling.
Black end title card with faint text.

notable_text: RT @WhiteHouse: 'Restoring the Reflecting Pool. Making D.C. beautiful again!'
